title: System Emails
description: Preview recipients and send resumable admin system notifications without exposing the full recipient list.

form.title: Compose notification
form.description: Preview the matched users first, then send or continue delivery in resumable batches.

help.scope: Preview is generated on the server. The browser only receives a recipient count and masked samples.
help.singleUser: Use an exact user ID or exact email address.
help.body: Plain text only. Line breaks are preserved as paragraphs in the email.
help.batch: Each send request processes up to 30 recipients. If needed, continue with the same job.

preview.title: Preview
preview.description: Recipients are stored server-side in a short-lived job so the send can continue after a partial run.
